title: DOMMatrix error in Extract from File (PDF) Node
symptom: The Extract from File (PDF) node fails with the error 'DOMMatrix is not defined' when processing PDFs. This issue started in n8n version 1.98.0 and persists in newer versions.
root_cause: The error occurs because the upgraded `pdfjs-dist` dependency in n8n version 1.98.0 requires browser-native APIs like `DOMMatrix`, which are not available in server-side environments such as Docker. This incompatibility leads to the failure of the node when processing PDF files.
fix_steps: For Docker users, use the image tag: n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:1.97.1
Test the Extract from File (PDF) node again
agent_instruction: Downgrade your n8n instance to version 1.97.1 to resolve the DOMMatrix error.
safety_notes: Downgrading may re-introduce other bugs fixed in later versions.
